notes: Detached SO(3) regression suite (#1444 P5). Five shots cover the five checks from the P5 plan: (1) so3_smooth_sweep — primary smooth-deformation at cardinal yaw; (2) so3_offsnap_disc — per-voxel depth ordering at 45° off-cardinal yaw; (3) so3_wide_parity — full-scene cross-host GL/Metal parity; (4) so3_grid_cross — GRID-mode entities unaffected by DETACHED changes; (5) so3_offsnap_wide — second cross-host parity angle at 30°. warmup=120 matches the P4 Metal verification screenshot warmup (#1465). Identity fast-path (zero-rotation) is validated separately: run with --no-spin to verify the no-rotation path is byte-identical to master. Shot order mirrors kShots[] in main.cpp — the Nth entry maps to the Nth full-frame screenshot_NNNNNN.png. Reference PNGs live in sibling subdirs per CMake preset (macos-debug/, linux-debug/) since Metal and OpenGL produce pixel-different output.
